facebook.caption: Tourists walk past this place every day. Big mistake. RASOI INDIAN PURE VEGETARIAN RESTAURANT on 97 Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is pulling a 4.8 from 1,241 reviews and most beach-goers have no idea it exists. 100% vegetarian. Zero compromise on flavor. If you're skipping meat this trip, or just want something that isn't seafood and rice, this is your spot. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: 1,241 people rated this 4.8 stars. It's a pure vegetarian Indian restaurant in the middle of Duong Dong. Watch the thali land on that table and tell me you're not immediately hungry.

instagram.caption: Tourists keep walking past this. 4.8 stars. 1,241 reviews. Pure vegetarian Indian food in Duong Dong. Don't sleep on RASOI INDIAN PURE VEGETARIAN RESTAURANT. Save this.
instagram.video_caption: Pure vegetarian. 4.8 stars. Right on 97 Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. Phu Quoc eats different when you find RASOI.
